title: Anika 62290 Folding TV Table / Natural Rubberwood / 37 x 48.5 x 66cm / Sturdy and Durable / Fully Assembled and Easy Clean
features: Sturdy Construction: Crafted from durable rubberwood, ensuring longevity and stability
Space-Saving Design: Folds away neatly when not in use, perfect for small spaces
Easy to Clean: The natural rubberwood finish wipes clean with minimal effort
Versatile Use: Ideal for dining, working, or placing items while watching TV
Ready to Use: Arrives fully assembled, allowing you to enjoy it right out of the box
description: Product Description Folding TV Table Soft Close This natural wood TV table is smart and simple to use – it’s ideal for evenings with a takeaway or when working from home. The folding design means it quickly expands into a perfectly upright table to be enjoyed in an instant and folds flat when you’re done using it. The table is made from rubberwood and can hold up to 40KG in weight. This TV tray table features an easy-to-clean surface that can be wiped down using just a light cloth or damp paper towel with mild soap. This multi-functional table is ideal for putting snacks, beverages, a laptop, or remote controls on. Its classic look will complement any living room, conservatory, or bedroom. KEY FEATURES: Folding design Natural rubberwood Multifunctional Classic look Holds up to 40KG COMPACT DESIGN The table can be easily stored away behind a door or inside a cupboard without taking up space. SMART AND SIMPLE Coming fully assembled, the folding design makes it easy and efficient to use.
